summary: Completed testing of new WaMerce features: FulfillmentDashboard UI, 1688 auth endpoints, and fulfillment pipeline APIs. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend fulfillment page loads correctly with pipeline visualization, stats cards, pending orders sidebar, and Process button functionality working.

minor.issue: Product API returns 400 error (needs user re-authorization on 1688 console)
minor.note: Trade API is working correctly. Product API requires re-authorization with product scope.

critical_code_review_comments: FulfillmentDashboard.jsx properly uses data-testid attributes for testing
Pipeline visualization (Shopify → 1688 → DWZ56 → Delivered) renders correctly
Stats cards update dynamically when orders are processed
Process button successfully adds orders to fulfillment pipeline
1688 auth endpoints provide clear instructions for re-authorization
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) FulfillmentDashboard.jsx - pipeline visualization working, stats cards updating, Process buttons functional. 2) 1688 auth endpoints - /auth/url returns OAuth URL, /auth/test shows Trade API working but Product API needs re-auth. 3) Fulfillment pipeline APIs - all CRUD operations working. Pipeline now has 2 orders after testing.

passed_tests: test_1688_auth_url - Returns OAuth authorization URL with instructions
test_1688_auth_test - Shows Trade API working, Product API needs re-auth
test_fulfillment_pipeline_returns_orders - Pipeline endpoint returns orders list

elements_verified: Stats cards (Total, Pending, Processing, Purchased, etc.) displayed
Pipeline Orders section with order cards
Pending Orders sidebar with Process buttons
interactions_tested: Process button - successfully adds order to pipeline
Store selector dropdown - shows all stores

1688_auth_endpoints.GET /api/1688/auth/test: WORKING - Trade API working, Product API needs re-auth
